title: GenAI Jumpstart: Build Your First AI Agent
summary: Build your first working AI agent while understanding how prompts, tools, memory, and orchestration fit together inside a real GenAI system.
idealFor: Experienced developers new to GenAI systems
Professionals who want a guided first build
buildOutcome: A working AI agent that can reason through a task, use tools, and produce a useful result.
features: Understand the building blocks of a practical AI agent
Connect an LLM to tools and external functions
Build and run a guided agent workflow
See where memory, RAG, and multi-agent patterns fit
Leave with starter code and an extension roadmap

title: Vibe Coding With Claude AI
summary: Turn an idea into a working application using Claude AI, structured prompting, iterative development, debugging, and responsible AI-assisted coding.
idealFor: Senior developers curious about AI-assisted development
Professionals who want to build faster without losing engineering discipline
buildOutcome: A working application created through an AI-assisted development workflow using Claude AI.
features: Convert a business idea into a clear implementation plan
Use Claude AI for requirements, design, code generation, and refactoring
Review, debug, and improve AI-generated code
Apply source control and basic testing throughout the build
Leave with a working application and a repeatable Vibe Coding workflow

title: Build GenAI Workflows With n8n
summary: Build practical GenAI automations using n8n by connecting LLMs, business data, APIs, approvals, notifications, and operational workflows.
idealFor: Professionals who prefer low-code or no-code implementation
buildOutcome: A working AI-powered business workflow using n8n, an LLM, external data, and at least one business integration.
features: Design an AI workflow around a real business use case
Connect n8n with LLMs, APIs, documents, and databases
Add conditions, human approvals, retries, and error handling
Build a usable automation rather than a disconnected demo
Leave with a reusable workflow template and deployment guidance

title: Build a Production-Ready RAG Assistant
summary: Design and build a RAG assistant over real documents with ingestion, chunking, retrieval, citations, evaluation, guardrails, and a deployable API.
idealFor: Professionals who have already tried basic RAG tutorials
buildOutcome: A working RAG assistant that answers questions from a document collection and provides grounded responses with source references.
features: Design the end-to-end RAG architecture
Build document ingestion, chunking, embedding, and retrieval
Add citations, guardrails, and response evaluation
Expose the system through an API or lightweight interface
Leave with a deployable implementation and architecture diagram

title: Build a Multi-Agent Business Workflow
summary: Design and build a multi-agent system where specialised agents collaborate to complete a real business workflow with clear controls and observable execution.
idealFor: Tech leads familiar with basic LLM applications
buildOutcome: A multi-agent workflow with specialised responsibilities, tool usage, shared state, and controlled hand-offs.
features: Decide when multiple agents are justified
Define agent roles, responsibilities, and boundaries
Implement orchestration, shared state, and tool access
Add logging, failure handling, and human checkpoints
Leave with a working multi-agent system and architecture blueprint

title: GenAI System Design for Senior Engineers
summary: Learn how to translate a GenAI use case into a production-minded architecture covering models, data, APIs, evaluation, security, observability, and deployment.
buildOutcome: A complete GenAI system architecture for a real business use case, including decisions, trade-offs, and a deployment plan.
features: Frame functional and non-functional requirements
Choose between prompting, RAG, tools, agents, and fine-tuning
Design for security, cost, scale, reliability, and observability
Document key architecture decisions and trade-offs
Leave with an architecture blueprint and review checklist
